title: How to Make Your AI Agents Work Better (With Context Hygiene)
summary: Jordan Urbs describes context hygiene as a three-layer framework (Skills, Harnesses, and Hygiene) for maintaining consistent AI agent behavior across long interactions without losing context. The approach uses CLAUDE.md behavioral files, multi-agent orchestration, and lazy loading to keep context windows clean while delegating work to subagents spawned in fresh conversations.
